ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "New", NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Paperwork Sent")) ),
AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Paperwork Sent", NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Paperwork Received")) ),
AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Paperwork Received", NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Client Coded")) ),
AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Client Coded", NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")) ),
AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), OR( PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Closed Won", PRIORVALUE(StageName) = "Closed Lost" ) ),
AND( ISNEW(), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "New")) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opportunity stages must follow this order: New → Paperwork Sent → Paperwork Received → Client Coded → Closed Won/Closed Lost. Closed opportunities cannot be reopened.
